messages.text: can u extract a clean prd from this issue?

Here is a clean Product Requirements Document (PRD) extracted and synthesized from Issue #699:

# Product Requirements Document (PRD)
**Task:** Improve Login Page UI Design Consistency 
**Domain:** Frontend / UI

## 1. Objective
Update the visual design and layout of the login page to align with the updated design specification and establish consistency with the existing design system standards.

## 2. Context
The current login page implementation differs significantly from the desired design. It currently lacks a background, utilizes a narrower card structure, displays email/password fields instead of a strictly Google-focused login, and is missing several key UI elements (such as decorative dividers, signup CTAs, and footer help links). The new design relies strictly on Right-to-Left (RTL) structure for Hebrew text.

## 3. UI & UX Requirements

### Layout Constraints
* **Direction:** RTL (Right-to-Left) specifically for Hebrew typography.
* **Background:** Full-page light gray/off-white (mapped to `bg-muted` or `bg-secondary` design tokens).
* **Alignment:** Content must be fully vertically and horizontally centered on the page.

### Header Section (Above Card)
* **Headline:** "שלום, מוכנים להצליח?" — Large (`~text-4xl`), bold, dark color, centered.
* **Subtitle:** "A-Guy המורה הפרטי שלכם" — Smaller (`~text-base`), muted/gray color, centered.
* **Spacing:** Generous vertical spacing (`~py-16`) separating the header text from the login card.

### Login Card Spec
* **Container:** White background, rounded corners (`rounded-xl`), subtle prominent shadow (`shadow-lg`).
* **Dimensions:** Centered, roughly `max-w-md` (wider than the previous `max-w-sm` container).
* **Padding:** Generous internal padding (`~p-8` or `p-10`).

### Card Content (Top to Bottom)
1. **Decorative Element:** Small centered horizontal line at the top (short `border-t` or `<hr>`, `~w-12`, accent color).
2. **Section Label:** "כניסה מהירה" (Quick Entry) — Centered, medium text, dark color.
3. **Primary Action (Google Sign-In):** Full-width, white/light background, bordered, rounded. Must include the Google "G" icon on the right side and the text "המשך עם Google".
4. **Divider:** A visual separator placed beneath the Google button.
5. **Secondary Action (Signup CTA):** "הרשמה ללא עלות" (Free Registration) — Styled as a secondary/outline button or an accent link with background. Centered.
6. **Card Footer Text:** "גישה מהירה ומאובטחת." and "בלחיצה אחת אתם בפנים." — Small text, muted color, centered.
7. *Note: Ensure legacy email/password form elements are removed per the new design.*

### Page Footer
* **Help Link:** "?זקוקים לעזרה" (Need help?) alongside a help/question-mark icon. Must be centered at the very bottom of the page utilizing small, muted text.

## 4. Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Page features a full-page light background and correct RTL layout.
- [ ] Card layout uses a wider structure (`max-w-md`) with prominent shadows and generous padding.
- [ ] Small decorative line appears strictly above the "כניסה מהירה" section label.
- [ ] Google Sign-In button is full-width with the correct icon and text alignment.
- [ ] Signup CTA and footer text (with help links) are correctly positioned below the primary actions.
- [ ] All UI elements, interactive states (hover, focus, disabled), and spacing utilize established design system tokens.
- [ ] Layout behaves responsively across device breakpoints.

## 5. Technical Scope & Implementation Notes
* **Target Files:** 
  * `src/app/(frontend)/login/LoginPageContent.tsx`
  * `src/app/(frontend)/login/LoginForm.tsx`
* **Design System Reference:** Refer to `DESIGN_SYSTEM.md` and `tailwind.config.mjs` for available tokens.
* **Components Context:** Native UI components (button, card, input, label) should be sourced from `src/ui/web/components/`. 
* **Quality Assurance:** TypeScript must compile without errors; linting and formatting pipelines must pass.
extract a clean prd from this issue, without any technical ref or css styling guidelines, only product req

Here is a clean Product Requirements Document (PRD) focused entirely on the user experience, product features, and functional requirements, with all technical and styling terminology removed.

# Product Requirements Document: Login Page Redesign

## 1. Objective
Redesign the user login page to provide a streamlined, modern, and localized entry experience. The new design shifts the focus entirely to Single Sign-On (SSO) authentication and establishes a welcoming, brand-aligned visual hierarchy.

## 2. General UX & Layout Requirements
*   **Localization:** The page must be fully designed for the Hebrew language, adhering strictly to a Right-to-Left (RTL) reading and interaction layout.
*   **Page Structure:** The overall layout must feature a solid, light-colored background. All core content (headers, login card) must be perfectly centered both vertically and horizontally on the user's screen.
*   **Responsiveness:** The layout must adapt gracefully across all device sizes (mobile, tablet, and desktop).

## 3. Core Elements & Features

### Page Header (Above the Login Form)
The header serves to welcome the user before they interact with the login module. It must be clearly separated from the login form.
*   **Primary Headline:** "שלום, מוכנים להצליח?" (Hello, ready to succeed?) — Must be the largest text on the page, bold, and highly visible.
*   **Subtitle:** "A-Guy המורה הפרטי שלכם" (A-Guy your private tutor) — Smaller, subdued text placed directly below the headline.

### The Login Card
The main interactive container for authentication. It must appear as a distinct, elevated, and well-padded container resting on the background.
*   **Visual Structure:** A clean, rounded white container with a subtle shadow to indicate elevation.
*   **Legacy Feature Removal:** All previous manual entry fields (Email and Password inputs) must be entirely removed from the interface.
*   **Internal Elements (Top to Bottom):**
    1.  **Decorative Accent:** A minimal visual line centered at the very top of the card's interior.
    2.  **Section Title:** "כניסה מהירה" (Quick Entry) — Positioned clearly to indicate the action area.
    3.  **Primary Authentication Action:** A single, prominent, full-width button for Google Single Sign-On. It must feature the standard Google "G" logo on the right side and the text "המשך עם Google" (Continue with Google).
    4.  **Visual Divider:** A clear separation line below the primary action.
    5.  **Secondary Action (Registration):** A visually distinct call-to-action for new users: "הרשמה ללא עלות" (Free Registration).
    6.  **Trust Copy (Card Footer):** Small, reassuring text at the bottom of the card reading: "גישה מהירה ומאובטחת." (Fast and secure access) and "בלחיצה אחת אתם בפנים." (One click and you're in).

### Page Footer
*   **Support Link:** A subtle help link placed at the absolute bottom of the page screen, reading "?זקוקים לעזרה" (Need help?). It must be accompanied by a standard question mark or help icon.
much simpler, provide the link in the issue, and dont provide any ui ux guidelines, except from ignoring header and footer

### Product Requirements: Login Page Update

**Design Reference:** 
https://sample-banana-62009166.figma.site

**Core Requirements:**
* Implement the new login page content based on the provided reference link.
* Transition the page to a strict Right-to-Left (RTL) layout for Hebrew text.
* Remove the existing manual email and password input fields.
* Implement a Google Single Sign-On (SSO) button as the sole primary authentication method ("המשך עם Google").
* Include a secondary call-to-action for new user registration ("הרשמה ללא עלות").

**Out of Scope / Exclusions:**
* Ignore the page header.
* Ignore the page footer.

### Product Requirements: Login Page Redesign

**Design Reference:** 
https://sample-banana-62009166.figma.site

**Requirements:**
* Update the login page content and structure to match the provided design reference.
* Ensure the page operates in a Right-to-Left (RTL) layout for Hebrew.
* Remove the legacy email and password input fields.
* Add the secondary call-to-action for new user registration ("הרשמה ללא עלות").
* *(Note: Google Single Sign-On is already implemented).*

**Exclusions:**
* Ignore the page header.
* Ignore the page footer.

### Product Requirements: Login Page Redesign

**Design Reference:** 
https://sample-banana-62009166.figma.site

**Core Requirements:**
* Update the login page to match the provided design reference.
* Ensure the page uses a Right-to-Left (RTL) layout for Hebrew text.
* Add the new user registration option ("הרשמה ללא עלות").
* Retain the existing legacy email and password input fields.
* Retain the existing Google Single Sign-On (SSO) button.

**Exclusions:**
* Ignore the page header.
* Ignore the page footer.
